gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 144)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 144)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) مَا أَشَدَّ حُزْنَ النِّسَاءِ وَ أَبْعَدَ فِرَاقَ الْمَوْتِ وَ أَشَدُّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ كُلِّهِ فَقْرٌ يَتَمَلَّقُ صَاحِبُهُ ثُمَّ لَا يُعْطَى شَيْئاً.

en.hubeali: H 14721 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-nawfaly, from Al-Sakuny, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws has said that the Rasool Allahsaww said: ‘There is nothing more intense than the grief of a woman, nor anything more remote than the separation of the death, and more intense than all of that is poverty. One flatters his companion, who then does not give him anything’.
en.sarwar: 273. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-nawfaly, from Al-Sakuny, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) has said that the Rasool Allah (saww) said: ‘There is nothing more intense than the grief of a woman, nor anything more remote than the separation of the death, and more intense than all of that is poverty. One flatters his companion, who then does not give him anything’.
